_meta.description: HKDSE grade-to-point conversion scales used by JUPAS universities. Each scale maps raw HKDSE letter grades to numerical points for admissions scoring purposes.

standard_7pt.description: Standard 7-point scale used by most JUPAS universities including HKUST, PolyU, CityU, HKBU, Lingnan, HKMU, HSUHK, EdUHK, and selected HKU/CUHK programmes (e.g. HKU Medicine).

hku_enhanced.description: Enhanced scale used by most HKU programmes (excluding Medicine, which uses standard_7pt). Awards higher points for top grades to differentiate among high-achieving applicants.

cuhk_enhanced.description: Enhanced scale used by most CUHK programmes. Awards higher points for top grades to differentiate among high-achieving applicants.
